description_long: This is a compact, rectangular wooden cabinet with a natural, unfinished appearance, featuring visible wood grain and knots throughout its surfaces. The front side has two vertical doors, each equipped with a round wooden knob for easy opening. The cabinet's top is flat and slightly overhangs the main body, providing a subtle decorative edge. The sides and back are plain, with the same wood texture and coloration, and no additional features or openings. The construction appears sturdy, with the doors fitting closely together and the overall form being symmetrical. This type of cabinet would be suitable for use in garages, workshops, or outdoor urban environments for storage purposes.
description: A small, sturdy wooden cabinet with two front doors and round knobs, featuring a natural wood grain finish. Its simple, functional design makes it suitable for urban storage.
description_view_0: Front view showing two vertical doors with round wooden knobs and visible wood grain.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the plain, flat wooden side and the edge of the front doors.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a featureless, flat wooden back with natural wood texture.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the plain side and the edge of the doors.
